| [HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions') | Provides the Aspire hosting extension that wires a Hexalith\.EventStore \<b\>domain module\</b\> \(a domain service such as the Counter sample or the Tenants service\) with its DAPR sidecar\. A domain module no longer ships its own `*.AppHost`/`*.Aspire` project to hand\-roll this wiring — the EventStore AppHost adds the module's project and calls [AddEventStoreDomainModule\(this IResourceBuilder&lt;ProjectResource&gt;, HexalithEventStoreResources, string, string, string, string, string\)](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.AddEventStoreDomainModule(thisAspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources,string,string,string,string,string) 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions\.AddEventStoreDomainModule\(this Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\<Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource\>, Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreResources, string, string, string, string, string\)'), which attaches a correctly configured DAPR sidecar \(Epic A4\)\. |
| [HexalithEventStoreExtensions](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreExtensions.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreExtensions') | Provides extension methods for adding the Hexalith EventStore topology to an Aspire distributed application\. |
| [HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStorePlatformExtensions') | Provides the Aspire hosting extension that adds the Hexalith\.EventStore platform projects \(command gateway, Admin\.Server\.Host and Admin\.UI\) to a domain\-module AppHost\. |
